```{r, include = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(gtsummary)
library(estimatr)
library(modelsummary)
library(labelled)
library(readxl)
library(flextable) # regression_basic
library(broom) # regression_advanced
library(effects) # interaction
library(margins) # logit
library(fixest) # paneldata
library(xtsum) # paneldata
## データ作成のための追加パッケージ
library(openxlsx)

## 説明のための追加パッケージ
library(dagitty)
library(ggdag)

## ggplot theme
theme_set(theme_bw(
  base_family = "HiraginoSans-W3",
  base_size = 11,
  base_rect_size = 0.2,
  base_line_size = 0.2
))
```
